name: EnvironmentFiles
summary: The EnvironmentFiles class is for the paths where the attributes file will be searched for.

constructors.name: EnvironmentFiles
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EnvironmentFiles class

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(String)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the standard property file directories.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: The name of the file including the file extension.

returns.doc: A file info for the first match in the directory list. Null if no match was found.

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(List.String., String)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Deprecated. Please use GetAttributeFile(string fileName) instead.", false)] public static FileInfo GetAttributeFile(List<string> searchDirectories, string fileName)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the search directories.

params.name: searchDirectories
params.doc: The list of directories to be used for searching for the file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: The name of the file including the file extension.

returns.doc: A file info for the first match in the directory list. Null if no match was found.

methods.name: GetAttributeFiles
methods.summary: Gets attribute files with specified suffix from model, XS_FIRM and XS_PROJECT directories and subdirectories.

returns.doc: A list of found file names

methods.name: GetMultiDirectoryFileList(String)
methods.summary: Gets a list of files with the given extension from the default search directories.

params.name: fileExtension
params.doc: The file extension to be used.

returns.doc: A list of files with the given extension.

methods.name: GetMultiDirectoryFileList(List.String., String)
methods.signature: public static List<string> GetMultiDirectoryFileList(List<string> searchDirectories, string fileExtension)
methods.summary: Gets a list of files with the given extension from the given search directories and from XS_FIRM, XS_PROJECT subdirectories.

params.name: searchDirectories
params.doc: The search directories to be used.

params.name: fileExtension
params.doc: The file extension to be used.

returns.doc: A list of found file names without the file extension.

methods.name: GetStandardPropertyFileDirectories
methods.summary: Gets the paths where to look for the property files.

returns.doc: The paths where to look for the property files.

methods.name: IsValidDirectory
methods.summary: Checks if a directory is valid.

returns.doc: True if the directory is valid.

properties.name: PropertyFileDirectories
properties.summary: The directories where to look for property files.
